RESOURCES
Consistency
Theory And
Tactics
The first of The 5 Core Habits - Consistency. Using
consistency to grow your success in life.
Consistency Theory
- Boring work.
- Consistency > Effort
- Compound Effect
- Consistency not variety
- Be stable
- Never NOT do the basics
Consistency Tactics
- Sleep time
- Wake up time
- Same time on the weekends
- Keep changes minimal
- Journal
